scenario_text: Multiple exams in the same week; fear of disappointing parents.
Dread of speaking in class; worry about judgment.
Best friend stopped replying; uncertainty about what happened.
Hurtful messages in a group chat; anxiety before checking phone.
Pressure to choose a specific major or career; fear of letting family down.
Cannot fall asleep; overthinking and rumination at night.
Balancing school, part-time job, and extracurriculars; feeling burned out.
Overwhelmed by essays and deadlines; fear of rejection.
Feeling different at school; unsure how to fit in (non-clinical).
Poor test score after studying; self-criticism and frustration.
